messages.inline_script_tag: Inline <script> tags are blocked by the DataLens sanitizer.
messages.section_tag: The <section> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.article_tag: The <article> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.main_tag: The <main> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.header_tag: The <header> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.footer_tag: The <footer> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.nav_tag: The <nav> tag is not allowed in generated Advanced Editor runtime HTML.
messages.table_tag: HTML <table> markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.thead_tag: HTML table markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.tbody_tag: HTML table markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.tr_tag: HTML table markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.td_tag: HTML table markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.th_tag: HTML table markup is blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.style_tag: Inline <style> tags are blocked in final generated Advanced Editor payloads.
messages.iframe_tag: Inline <iframe> tags are blocked by the DataLens sanitizer.
messages.object_tag: Inline <object> tags are blocked by the DataLens sanitizer.
messages.embed_tag: Inline <embed> tags are blocked by the DataLens sanitizer.
messages.unsupported_html_tag: HTML tag is not in the current Advanced Editor runtime allowlist.
messages.inline_event_handler: Inline event-handler attributes are blocked by the Advanced Editor runtime contract.
messages.srcdoc_attribute: srcdoc attributes are blocked by the Advanced Editor runtime contract.
messages.editor_metaon_tab: Compiled Editor payload contains invalid metaon tab name.
messages.unsupported_editor_meta_title: Editor data.meta must not contain unsupported title; use entry/dashboard native title metadata.
messages.svg_marker_width: SVG markerWidth is not documented as supported in the target renderer.
messages.svg_marker_height: SVG markerHeight is not documented as supported in the target renderer.
messages.svg_marker_end: SVG marker-end is not documented as supported in the target renderer.
messages.unsupported_rel: rel attributes are not supported in generated runtime HTML.
messages.direct_document_cookie: document.cookie access is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.direct_document_write: document.write is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.window_open: window.open is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.unresolved_local_require: Generated bundles must not contain unresolved local require('../_shared') imports.
messages.direct_window_access: Direct window.* browser API access is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.direct_document_access: Direct document.* browser API access is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.eval_call: eval() is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.new_function_constructor: new Function() is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.local_storage: localStorage access is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.session_storage: sessionStorage access is forbidden in Advanced Editor runtime code.
messages.unsafe_uri_scheme: Generated href/src values allow HTTPS and relative references by default; HTTP needs explicit opt-in and other schemes fall back to plain text.
messages.dynamic_uri_without_sanitizer: Dynamic href/src values must pass through a URI sanitizer and fall back to plain text when rejected.
messages.duplicate_inline_title: Inline title or hint rendering duplicates dashboard native metadata.
messages.inline_hint_ui: Dashboard hints must use native metadata rather than chart-body UI.
messages.unknown_runtime_call: Unknown Editor runtime call is not in the official Editor method list.
messages.unserializable_d3_pattern: D3 data binding uses a pattern that can be unserializable in DataLens runtime.
messages.wrapfn_argument_bytes: Editor.wrapFn args are large enough to risk runtime serialization cost.
messages.heavy_loop_budget_risk: Loop iteration count is high relative to documented Advanced Editor execution budgets.
messages.data_multiplication_budget_risk: Data multiplication pattern may exceed documented Advanced Editor execution budgets.
messages.decorative_css_shadow: Decorative shadows are blocked by the renderer visual spec.
messages.decorative_css_gradient: Decorative gradients are blocked by the renderer visual spec.
messages.decorative_css_3d: 3D or perspective styling is blocked by the renderer visual spec.
messages.html_table_bar: Use native table bar formatting instead of custom HTML percent bars.
messages.html_table_inside_advanced_editor: HTML table structures inside Advanced Editor are blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.div_grid_table_inside_advanced_editor: Div-grid table structures inside Advanced Editor are blocked; use native table_node objects.
messages.inline_chart_body_heading: Chart title headings belong in native dashboard/widget metadata, not Advanced Editor body HTML.
messages.composite_dashboard_in_advanced_editor: One Advanced Editor object may render one chart object only; dashboard-like composites require an explicit static reference artifact marker.
messages.selector_inside_advanced_editor_body: Selector/filter UI must be a native control_node widget, not Advanced Editor body HTML.
messages.kpi_card_grid_inside_advanced_editor: KPI grids must be separate one-metric KPI objects, not multi-card Advanced Editor HTML.
messages.selector_option_value_not_string: Selector option values must be strings for stable DataLens parameter behavior.
